name: toggle-proxy
title: Toggle Proxy
description: Toggle SOCKS proxy, manage Xray configs, and convert VLESS URLs on macOS
author: kaidstor

commands.name: menu-bar-proxy
commands.title: Proxy Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Toggle Proxy
commands.description: Toggle SOCKS proxy and select Xray config from the menu bar

commands.name: toggle-socks-proxy
commands.title: Convert VLESS URL
commands.subtitle: Toggle Proxy
commands.description: Convert a VLESS URL to an Xray JSON configuration file

commands.name: ssh-tunnel-manager
commands.title: Tunnel Manager
commands.subtitle: Toggle Proxy
commands.description: Create and manage SSH tunnel connections

commands.name: config-manager
commands.title: Config Manager
commands.subtitle: Toggle Proxy
commands.description: Browse, edit, and delete Xray configuration files

commands.name: subscription-manager
commands.title: Subscription Manager
commands.subtitle: Toggle Proxy
commands.description: Manage VLESS subscription URLs and update configs

commands.name: routing-rules
commands.title: Routing Rules
commands.subtitle: Toggle Proxy
commands.description: Customize routing rules per subscription. Overrides the rules baked into subscription configs when enabled.

preferences.name: xrayPath
preferences.description: Path to directory containing Xray binary and configs
preferences.title: Xray Config Path

preferences.name: defaultConfig
preferences.description: Name of the default Xray configuration file
preferences.title: Default Config

preferences.name: networkInterface
preferences.description: Network interface for proxy settings (e.g. Wi-Fi, Ethernet)
preferences.title: Network Interface

preferences.name: sortByPing
preferences.title: Menu Bar
preferences.label: Sort configs by ping (real delay)
preferences.description: When enabled, configs in the menu bar are sorted by measured latency. Subscription configs are grouped by node.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
